ingest.title: Ingest Activity
ingest.empty: No ingest runs yet. Click "Run Ingest" to start.
ingest.emptyBody: Upload a document or trigger an ingest run to let Synapse extract pages, links, review items, and graph relationships.
ingest.noRunSelected: Select a run to see details.

upload.label: Upload document
upload.drop: Drop a file here, or click to browse

settings.title: Settings

general.desc: Tune how much context Synapse can carry into model calls and how that budget is split.
general.note: Use this when answers feel too short, too forgetful, or too expensive.
general.contextWindowExplainer: Larger windows preserve more history and retrieved wiki context, but can increase latency and cost.
general.budgetExplainer: The split below is applied automatically so chat, retrieval, system instructions, and generation each get predictable room.

settings.contextWindowHelp: Maximum tokens sent to the model per request.

llmModels.title: LLM Models
llmModels.desc: One row per provider. Changes take effect immediately. API keys are stored as environment variables — not in this UI.
llmModels.note: Providers drive chat, ingest synthesis, review assistance, and deep research. Vault-scoped rows override global rows for this vault.
llmModels.addProviderHelp: Add the model identity and optional base URL. Secrets stay outside the UI; configure them in the runtime environment.
llmModels.lastProviderWarning: This is the last configured provider. Chat and ingest will fail until a new provider is added.
llmModels.noProvidersHelp: Add at least one provider before using chat, ingest generation, or deep research.
llmModels.vaultProviderHelp: Only this vault will prefer this provider.
llmModels.globalProviderHelp: All vaults can use this provider unless a vault-specific row overrides it.

embeddings.title: Vector Embeddings
embeddings.desc: Enable semantic search against your wiki. Works with OpenAI-compatible /v1/embeddings endpoints, Ollama native embeddings, and other local models. No API key needed for local models.
embeddings.note: Embeddings decide whether retrieval understands meaning or only exact words. This page is read-only because the backend owns the runtime setting.
embeddings.envNote: Read-only — configured via environment variables (EMBEDDING_URL, EMBEDDING_MODEL, EMBEDDING_DIM). Edit your .env or docker-compose.yml to change.
embeddings.error: Could not load embedding config. Is the backend running?
embeddings.lexicalOnlyNote: Retrieval is running keyword-only (title + body match). Controlled by the EMBEDDINGS_ENABLED environment variable. URL, model, and dimensions below are informational only in this mode.
embeddings.semanticModeHelp: Chat and wiki search can match related concepts even when the exact words differ.
embeddings.lexicalModeHelp: Results depend more on titles and exact wording. This is safer for lightweight installs, but less flexible for discovery.

sourceWatch.desc: Watch a source folder and import changed files on a predictable schedule.
sourceWatch.note: Use this for ongoing notes, exported docs, or folders that should keep the wiki fresh without manual uploads.
sourceWatch.howItWorks: Synapse scans the configured directory, queues supported files, and records each run in Sources so you can inspect cost and errors.

apiMcp.title: API + MCP
apiMcp.desc: Expose Synapse to your own tools through the local HTTP API, and optionally through the bundled MCP server for agent clients.
apiMcp.note: Use this when Codex, Claude Desktop, claude.ai, or another agent should read from or write to your wiki.
apiMcp.error: Could not load MCP server info. Is the backend running?

access.title: Access
access.why: Remote MCP can expose wiki tools outside the app. Keep token access on unless you are testing from a trusted private network.
access.revealWarning: Copy now — this token will not be shown again.
access.allowWithoutTokenCaveat: Token-less access applies only to private sources (loopback, LAN, Tailscale). Public access via Cloudflare tunnel always requires a token — this is enforced server-side and cannot be bypassed.

remote.title: Remote (claude.ai)
remote.when: Enable remote MCP only when an external client needs to connect over HTTP. Local Claude Desktop can use the stdio config below.
remote.noTokenNote: Generate a token or enable token-less access above to enable remote access.

output.title: Output Preferences
output.desc: Controls for generated content — language, conversation history length.
output.note: These settings affect how Synapse speaks and how much prior conversation it carries forward.
output.languageHelp: Language changes labels and model-facing output preferences where the app supports them.
output.convHistoryDesc: Number of prior messages sent to the AI on each request. More = richer context but more tokens.
output.memoryTradeoff: More messages help follow long threads; fewer messages reduce token use and keep answers focused.

interface.title: Interface
interface.note: The current interface is optimized for dense wiki work: scanning, comparing, reviewing, and jumping between sections.
interface.currentHelp: Navigation labels, compact cards, and responsive stacking are active. Theme and density controls will become editable later.
interface.comingSoon: Theme and density options — coming soon.

maintenance.title: Maintenance
maintenance.desc: Tools for cleaning up the wiki — detect and merge duplicate entities/concepts that the LLM created under different names across re-ingests.
maintenance.note: Use this area carefully: maintenance actions affect how pages and concepts remain connected over time.
maintenance.duplicatesDesc: Asks the LLM to scan all entity / concept pages and group ones that likely refer to the same topic under different names (English vs Italian, plural vs singular, abbreviation vs full form). You confirm each group before merging.
maintenance.resetDesc: Clears all locally stored settings and panel layout.
maintenance.resetImpact: This resets local UI preferences only. It does not delete wiki pages, sources, providers, or MCP server data.

about.title: About
about.desc: Synapse is a self-hosted LLM Wiki workspace for turning sources, chat, and research into linked knowledge.
about.note: The product direction is LLM Wiki plus an agent-ready local workbench: readable by humans, useful to tools.
about.positioning: Compared with a plain note importer, Synapse is designed around review loops, graph exploration, provider choice, and MCP access.

webClipper.desc: Configure the Chrome MV3 web clipper extension (F11). Clips are sent to this Synapse instance and auto-ingested via the watcher.
webClipper.error: Could not load web clipper config. Is the backend running?
webClipper.enabledHelp: When disabled, POST /clip returns 503 and the extension cannot ingest.
webClipper.revealWarning: Copy now — this token will not be shown again.
webClipper.originsHelp: Comma-separated extra origins (e.g. https://example.com). Loopback origins are always allowed.
webClipper.extensionHint: Load the extension from the extension/ folder in this repository (Chrome → Manage Extensions → Load unpacked).

webSearch.desc: SearXNG is the only supported web-search backend (I9). Used by Deep Research to fetch sources. Configure the URL and categories here.
webSearch.error: Could not load web search config. Is the backend running?
webSearch.urlHelp: Must be a valid http:// or https:// URL. The URL is not secret — it is displayed here in full.
webSearch.urlValidationError: Must be a valid http:// or https:// URL.
webSearch.categoriesHelp: Comma-separated SearXNG categories. Leave empty to use SearXNG defaults.
webSearch.maxQueriesHelp: Maximum SearXNG queries per deep-research iteration (1–50).
webSearch.clearHelp: Falls back to SEARXNG_URL env var and code defaults.
webSearch.searxngOnly: Only SearXNG is supported as the web-search backend. No other provider can be configured here (I9).

cliAuth.title: CLI Subscription Auth
cliAuth.error: Could not load CLI auth config. Is the backend running?
cliAuth.tokenHelp: Paste the token printed by `claude setup-token` on the host (starts with sk-ant-oat01-).
cliAuth.saveError: Failed to save. Is the backend running?
cliAuth.guideSteps:
1) On the host run: claude setup-token
2) Paste the printed sk-ant-oat01-… token here
3) Leave ANTHROPIC_API_KEY unset — the DB token is injected into the Claude CLI and the API key is scrubbed from its environment, so your subscription is used ($0 per token).
cliAuth.caveat: Security note: this token is stored in the application database in plaintext and grants access to your Claude subscription. Treat database backups accordingly. To rotate: re-run `claude setup-token` and paste the new value. To revoke: click Clear and the CLI will fall back to env / unconfigured.

chat.title: Chat
chat.noConversations: No conversations yet. Click + to start.
chat.empty: Send a message to start chatting.
chat.emptyTitle: Ask your wiki, not just a model
chat.emptyLead: Synapse can answer with retrieved context, turn useful replies into wiki pages, and help you find the next connection in the graph.
chat.emptyPromptMap: Map the strongest concepts in this vault
chat.emptyPromptSummarize: Summarize what changed in the latest sources
chat.emptyPromptResearch: Find gaps that need deep research
chat.inputPlaceholder: Ask anything… (Enter to send, Shift+Enter for newline)
chat.inputHint: Enter to send · Shift+Enter for newline

research.title: Deep Search
research.topicHint: Synapse will search the web, assess sources, and synthesize a wiki page.
research.empty: No research runs yet. Enter a topic and click Start Research.
research.emptyBody: Start with a focused question; Synapse will collect sources, track cost, and save useful synthesis back into the wiki.
research.providerMissing: Configure an LLM provider before starting deep research.
research.exampleTwo: Find gaps in the latest imported sources
research.noRunSelected: Select a run to see its detail and synthesis.

review.title: Review Queue
review.hint: AI proposals — create a page, start deep research, or skip.
review.empty: No proposals. Ingest some documents to populate the review queue.
review.emptyBody: After ingest, the LLM proposes follow-up work: missing pages, research gaps, contradictions, duplicates, and confirmations. You decide what to act on.
review.createFailed: Page generation failed — retry or skip.
review.searxngUnavailable: Deep research is unavailable: SEARXNG_URL is not configured on the backend.
review.sweepHelp: Run the auto-resolution sweep: closes missing-page and duplicate proposals whose page now exists, and optionally asks the LLM to close stale suggestions.
review.sweepResult: Sweep complete: {{rule}} rule-resolved, {{llm}} LLM-resolved, {{kept}} kept pending.
review.bulkResult: Bulk action complete: {{updated}} updated, {{skipped}} already resolved.
review.clearResolvedHelp: Hard-delete all terminal rows (skipped, dismissed, created, auto-resolved). Pending items are never touched.

cascadeDelete.warningsHint: These pages share source overlap with the page being deleted. The deletion will proceed, but review these after.
cascadeDelete.wikilinksCount: {{count}} dead [[wikilink]] will be neutralised to plain text
cascadeDelete.wikilinksCount_plural: {{count}} dead [[wikilinks]] will be neutralised to plain text
cascadeDelete.indexEntryRemoved: Entry in index.md will be removed
cascadeDelete.rawSourceDeleted: Raw source file will be deleted
cascadeDelete.noPagesDeleted: Only this page will be deleted.
cascadeDelete.noWikilinksToRewrite: No other pages reference this page.
cascadeDelete.noRawSource: No raw source file to delete.

noteView.selectPagePrompt: Select a page to read or edit
noteView.selectPageBody: Click any page in the tree on the left to open it here.
noteView.staleConflict: This note changed on disk — reload before editing

lint.title: Lint
lint.hint: Wiki health findings — fix or acknowledge each finding.
lint.runLintHelp: Run a bounded lint scan: structural checks + semantic review. Produces findings only — fixes are human-gated.
lint.empty: No open findings. Run a lint scan to check wiki health.
lint.emptyBody: Lint checks for orphan pages, missing cross-references, contradictions, stale claims, and missing pages. Click "Run Lint" to start.
lint.flagOnly: Flag-only — no file write on apply

insights.title: Graph Insights
insights.empty: No insights found. Add more pages and links to surface surprising connections and knowledge gaps.

search.title: Search
search.minCharsHint: Type at least 2 characters to search
search.emptyBody: Start typing to find pages by semantic similarity.
search.noResultsHint: Try different keywords or a broader query.

sources.title: Sources
sources.empty: Select a file to preview it
sources.emptyHint: No source files yet. Import a document to get started.
sources.noPreview: No preview available for this file type.

providerGate.title: No provider configured
providerGate.body: Configure an AI provider in Settings before using chat or ingest.

activity.cancelAllConfirm: Cancel all active and pending tasks?
